## PR9: Bounded Provider Roles + Verification Schemas

### Scope

Implements the Eval 2.0 provider-role boundary as a contract/types/test PR only.

This PR formalizes the asymmetric separation between:

- `primary_editorial_engine` — the only provider allowed to inject Phase 2/3 literary synthesis prose.
- `external_factual_auditor` — optional Phase 0 factual/plausibility audit rail.
- `external_compliance_checker` — optional Phase 4 report cross-check rail.

### Why

RevisionGrade should preserve a multi-engine verification moat without allowing external verifier prose to contaminate the core literary evaluation. This PR defines that boundary explicitly and adds tests proving external providers cannot feed unstructured prose into final synthesis.

### In scope

- Add bounded provider role contract.
- Add default external verification feature flags, both disabled by default.
- Add verification artifact schemas:
  - `factual_anomalies_detected_v1`
  - `external_report_crosscheck_v1`
- Add 500-character cap helpers for external verification text fields.
- Add a primary-only synthesis gate.
- Register the two external verification artifacts in the canonical artifact registry.
- Add tests proving provider isolation and schema bounds.

### Out of scope

- No Perplexity API integration.
- No OpenAI/ChatGPT runtime changes.
- No live provider client code.
- No prompt changes.
- No route, worker, cron, SQL, or Supabase writes.
- No Phase 2/3 report-generation rewrite.
- No broad manuscript or DREAM benchmark sharing with external providers.

### Files changed

- `lib/evaluation/orchestration/providerContracts.ts`
- `lib/evaluation/artifacts/verificationSchemas.ts`
- `lib/evaluation/processor/synthesisGate.ts`
- `lib/evaluation/artifacts/artifactTypes.ts`
- `lib/evaluation/artifacts/artifactRegistry.ts`
- `__tests__/evaluation/providerDecoupling.test.ts`

### Tests added

- External verification flags default off.
- Primary editorial input compiles successfully.
- `external_factual_auditor` prose is hard-blocked from Phase 3 synthesis.
- `external_compliance_checker` prose is hard-blocked from Phase 3 synthesis.
- Exactly one primary editorial input is required.
- External report cross-check payloads stay bounded to structured violations.
- External verification text caps are enforced.
- Verification artifacts are registered as `external_verification`, not story authority.

### Reviewer note

This PR is intentionally contract-only. Reject any commit that adds live Perplexity calls, provider network clients, runtime synthesis rewiring, prompts, database writes, or UI work.
